text: EBITDA generation has strengthened considerably, with FY2025 EBITDA reaching $165,341,000,000 [CHUNK_ID: a0eaec82-9374-4c40-ae69-5ff4202160a8], up from $123,815,000,000 in FY2024 [CHUNK_ID: fae7ca76-ecce-40c0-a9db-c6cccdcf1d38], $89,402,000,000 in FY2023 [CHUNK_ID: 84302f37-2022-45a2-8a76-3be91ebe9e6b], and $38,352,000,000 in FY2022 [CHUNK_ID: d1ad7d52-3b2c-4db3-9d43-359a9062fd06]. FY2022 EBITDA margin was 7.46% [CALC_ID: cd2a13f8-6996-4b54-a953-05d0ed25f82c], while FY2022 free cash flow margin was negative at -3.29% [CALC_ID: a65e9487-8763-4d3c-aaba-17a6ad8077c0]. The substantial EBITDA growth suggests improved cash flow quality, though specific FY2025 operating cash flow and free cash flow figures are not available in the provided evidence to calculate current FCF margins.

issues.explanation: The As-Of date is 2025-07. Amazon's fiscal year ends on December 31. Therefore, full-year FY2025 EBITDA data cannot be realized or reported as of July 2025. Presenting this figure as a realized fact ('reaching') violates the temporal scope of the report.
issues.recommended_fix: Clarify that the FY2025 figure is a forecast or estimate (e.g., 'consensus estimates for FY2025 EBITDA project...') or remove the claim if actuals are required. Ensure all data points are available as of the report date.

issues.explanation: The cited evidence chunks (fae7ca76..., 84302f37..., d1ad7d52...) provide EBITDA values but do not explicitly state the fiscal year (text only says 'for FY'). The paragraph assigns specific years (2024, 2023, 2022) to these values without explicit support in the chunk text.
issues.recommended_fix: Ensure the cited chunks explicitly contain the fiscal year information or update the citations to reference metadata/sections that confirm the specific fiscal year for each value.

issues.offending_span: FY2022 EBITDA margin was 7.46%... FY2022 free cash flow margin was negative at -3.29%
issues.explanation: The cited calculation results (cd2a13f8..., a65e9487...) provide the margin percentages but do not explicitly specify 'FY2022' in their description (only 'FY'). The paragraph assigns the year 2022 without explicit support in the calculation result text.
issues.recommended_fix: Update calculation result descriptions to include the specific fiscal year or cite additional evidence that links these calculations to FY2022.
